data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net outflow of $170 million yesterday, with Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC leading the way with a net outflow of $114 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 16, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$170 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$30.5803 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached US$39.673 billion.
The second is Bitwise ETF BITB, with a single-day net inflow of US$12.8131 million. Currently, BITB's total net inflow in history has reached US$1.976 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a single-day net outflow of US$114 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow in history has reached US$11.256 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$93.65 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.6%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.267 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $12.0062 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 7 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 16, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 12.0062 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of 2.2448 million US dollars. Currently, the total net inflow of ETH has reached 570 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of 8.199 million US dollars. Currently, the total net outflow of ETHE has reached 4.245 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 5.245 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.76%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.244 billion US dollars.

data.title: Huobi HTX has launched the Fireblocks Off-Exchange asset mapping function, and the test transaction volume has increased by 200%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Huobi HTX announced that it has recently completed the integration of Fireblocks Off-Exchange asset mapping function, aiming to further reduce the counterparty risk of the exchange and provide more effective protection for users. This function allows institutional users to always keep their assets in a self-controlled collateral account, and obtain a 1:1 credit line based on the collateral balance on the Huobi HTX platform, while avoiding risks and enjoying the flexible and efficient trading experience of centralized exchanges.
It is reported that since Fireblocks Off-Exchange was launched on Huobi HTX, many institutional customers have settled in, and the overall test trading volume has increased by up to 200%. Huobi HTX said that it will continue to cooperate with industry-leading technology companies to promote the platform's continuous innovation in security, compliance, technology and services, and provide a more secure, efficient and compliant trading environment for global institutional customers.

data.title: Galaxy Ventures I Completes $100 Million Fundraising, Exceeds Target
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Galaxy Digital's venture capital fund Galaxy Ventures I has completed $100 million in fundraising, exceeding the original target. The fund focuses on equity and token investments in early Web3 and crypto startups, and its investment areas cover infrastructure, DeFi, security, development tools and consumer applications. Fundraising documents show that Galaxy Ventures I has attracted at least 7 institutions to participate. The fund is led by Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: The LBank listed token TIME has risen above 0.007USDT. Since its launch on LBank, the maximum increase has reached 285%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LBank market data shows: LBank's online token TIME rose above 0.007USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.007699USDT. The current price is 0.005697USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 184%. Since the launch of LBank, the maximum increase has reached 285%, and the current market value is approximately 5.81 million US dollars.

data.title: OSL provides pledge and custody services for China Asset Management's first Ethereum ETF in Hong Kong
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Digital asset platform OSL announced that it will provide institutional-grade staking and custody services for ChinaAMC Ether ETF, the first Ethereum spot ETF launched by ChinaAMC Hong Kong. This product is one of the first ETFs in the Hong Kong market with Ethereum native staking function. OSL Custody will provide compliant custody for it, and OSL Staking will assist in realizing Ethereum network staking income. OSL said that this move will further promote the integration of digital assets and traditional finance and help the development of Hong Kong's crypto asset ecosystem.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 84,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.11% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 17, 2025, 03:21 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 84,000 USDT and is now trading at 83,963.726563 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.11% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin Investor Behavior Signals Potential Local Peak
data.description: According to PANews, Glassnode analyzed on the X platform that on April 14, there was a divergence in Bitcoin trading behavior among different investor groups. The 30-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) for first-time buyers rose to 97.9, indicating a significant influx of new demand. Meanwhile, the RSI for steadfast buyers dropped to 3.2, suggesting they have nearly ceased increasing their holdings. Such behavioral divergence often signals the approach of a local peak.

data.title: The crypto sector partially fell back slightly, with the Layer2 sector leading the decline by 3.47%, while the SocialFi sector remained relatively strong
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 17, according to SoSoValue data, some crypto market sectors fell slightly, with the Layer2 sector leading the decline of 3.47%. Within the sector, Celestia (TIA) and Movement (MOVE) fell 7.38% and 12.28% respectively in 24 hours. The SocialFi sector was relatively strong, rising 1.08%, among which Toncoin (TON) rose 1.24%.
In other sectors, the Layer1 sector rose by 0.78%, among which Solana (SOL) and Hyperliquid (HYPE) rose by 3.25% and 4.32% respectively; the CeFi sector rose by 0.52%, and within the sector, LEO Token (LEO) and Bitget token (BGB) rose by 1.29% and 1.60% respectively; the Meme sector rose by 0.25%, among which Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) rose by 3.80%; the PayFi sector rose by 0.52%, and Bitcoin Cash (BCH) and Ultima (ULTIMA) rose by 3.45% and 3.91% respectively; the DeFi sector fell by 0.58%, but Raydium (RAY) rose by 3.08%.
In addition, the crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market trends of the sector, shows that the ssiSocialFi, ssiMAG7, and ssiCeFi indices rose by 0.75%, 0.48%, and 0.41% respectively in 24 hours, among which ssiMAG7's weekly return rate reached 5.26%.

data.title: OKX launches the Top 100 Strategic Trading Competition
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX will hold the Strategic Trading Top 100 Competition from 10:00 on April 17, 2025 (UTC+8) to 23:59 on April 26, 2025 (UTC+8). The event includes two modules: strategy compensation coupons and strategy trading competitions. Among them, the strategy compensation coupons event, new users of grid strategy and Martingale strategy can sign up to receive strategy compensation coupons, create corresponding strategies within the validity period, and if losses occur, they will receive a maximum of 10 USDT compensation. The strategy trading competition event is open to all users. During the event, complete the registration and meet the trading requirements. The top 100 users in the strategy trading volume ranking can share a maximum of 100,000 USDT prize pool, that is, each person can get a maximum of 1,000 USDT reward.
